grant_title: New Castle Conservation District Urban Farmer and Gardener Mini-Grant Program
project_area: Urban agriculture, community gardens, and urban farming projects
eligibility_summary: Open to nonprofits, community organizations, urban farmers, and community gardens in New Castle County, Delaware. Projects must support urban farms or community gardens, such as constructing raised beds, building compost systems, installing rain barrel systems, constructing fencing, or marketing programs/community outreach.
